verdicts.culprit: Agent decision: fixated on gateway and repeated apply_fix({'service': 'gateway'}) twice despite gateway depending on auth and gateway's status never changing — it never applied a fix to (or otherwise probed deeper into) auth, the actual root-cause candidate upstream of gateway, before giving up and escalating.

verdicts.explanation: Root-cause diagnosis (ingest) was correct, but the agent never achieved or verified a healthy ingest and the trajectory ends without closing the incident or tagging on-call initials, violating the verify-before-close and tag requirements.
verdicts.culprit: The remediation loop on 'ingest' (steps 15-28): two apply_fix attempts both left ingest degraded, and the trajectory stops there — no successful health check, no incident closure, no on-call tag.

verdicts.explanation: Agent correctly identified ingest as root cause and fixed it (never touching payments), but after apply_fix failed twice in a row (ingest stayed degraded both times), it just kept re-checking and re-applying the same fix instead of escalating an unresolved incident — the trajectory ends with ingest still degraded, no healthy verification, no close, and no on-call tag.
verdicts.culprit: The apply_fix({'service': 'ingest'}) loop (steps 15-28): after the first fix attempt (step 15-16) failed to bring ingest to healthy (step 17-18), the agent repeated the exact same fix (step 25-26) instead of escalating per the standing rules, and the trace ends with ingest still degraded, never closing or tagging the incident.

verdicts.explanation: The agent correctly root-caused to ingest (queue healthy, so ingest is the failure point nothing upstream explains) and applied the fix twice, but apply_fix reports success while ingest's status never actually transitions to healthy.
verdicts.culprit: apply_fix tool/environment problem: it reports 'Applied fix to ingest; restarting' but ingest remains status=degraded on every subsequent check, so the remediation never actually takes effect despite the agent correctly targeting the true root-cause service (ingest, not feed).
